name: ActiveConvention
description: Convention active request by a refreshment point.
preconditions: The Agency is in the form of a designated point of rest.
postconditions: The system shall notify the activation of the convention.
The system shall notify the activation of the convention.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

steps: Enable the activation function of the Convention.
Load the data request of the Convention from the point of rest and displays the corresponding form.
Check the data of the agreement and decide for activation.
Asks for confirmation of the activation.
